candidate_definitions.text: ⚡ Fast, async, stream-based link checker written in Rust. Finds broken URLs and mail addresses inside Markdown, HTML, reStructuredText, websites and more!
The fastest JSON schema Validator. Supports JSON Schema draft-04/06/07/2019-09/2020-12 and JSON Type Definition (RFC8927)
Internationalised error messages for Ajv JSON schema validator
Internationalised error messages for [Ajv](https://github.com/ajv-validator/ajv) - superfast JSON validator for JSON Schema and JSON Type Definition.
Additional JSON-Schema keywords for Ajv JSON validator
Khronos-reference front end for GLSL/ESSL, partial front end for HLSL, and a SPIR-V generator.
A powerful Rust library for OpenAPI 3.1,3.2 specification parsing, validation, and request handling.
Convert Swagger 2.0 definitions to OpenAPI 3.0 and resolve/validate/lint
This is the mono-repo for the following related projects
Stylelint plugin to validate CSS syntax
📱🚀 🧩 Cross Device & High Performance Normal Form/Dynamic(JSON Schema) Form/Form Builder -- Support React/React Native/Vue 2/Vue 3
Vue 2/3 isomorphic JSON editor, viewer, formatter and validator.
Grunt plugin for HTML validation, using the official Nu Html Checker (v.Nu)
Gulp plugin for HTML validation, using the official Nu Html Checker (v.Nu)
A small, simple, and fast JS validator. Like, wow that's fast. 🚀
A cron-expression validator for TypeScript/JavaScript projects.
⚔ Go package for data validation and filtering. support Map, Struct, Form data. Go通用的数据验证与过滤库，使用简单，内置大部分常用验证、过滤器，支持自定义验证器、自定义消息、字段翻译。
